keyMappings:
# === Scroll ===
  # Note: set scrollStepSize to 150 in Vimium Options to match j/k feel
  map j scrollDown
  map k scrollUp
  map <c-j> scrollPageDown
  map <c-k> scrollPageUp
  map <c-h> scrollLeft
  map <c-l> scrollRight

# === Tabs ===
  map J nextTab
  map K previousTab
  map <c-s-j> moveTabRight
  map <c-s-k> moveTabLeft
  map D duplicateTab

# === Clipboard ===
  unmap p
  unmap P
  map pp openCopiedUrlInCurrentTab
  map pP openCopiedUrlInNewTab

# === Hints ===
  map ;f LinkHints.activateMode
  map ;ll LinkHints.activateMode
  map ;lt LinkHints.activateModeToOpenInNewTab
  map ;lb LinkHints.activateModeWithQueue
  map ;ly LinkHints.activateModeToCopyLinkUrl
  map ;D LinkHints.activateModeToDownloadLink
  map ;ii focusInput
  map ;iI focusInput
